# Weather Lookup

Get the current weather conditions and forecast for any location.

## Usage

Ask me about the weather in any city, ZIP code, or airport code and I will provide current conditions including temperature, wind, and humidity.

## Notes

- Supports city names, ZIP codes, and airport codes
- No API key required
- Results are in metric by default
